The '''beetul''' was an insectoid creature, native to the forest planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. Some species were large enough for [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] to ride on, while others were quite small. One species was iridescent blue.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Beetul" is a deliberate misspelling of "beetle."

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
